g.text: Do you need to check if the collection contains some membr often?
Do you need the keys to be ordered?
Do you need to iterate over the collection, or maintain the insertion order?

Do you need to remove from the collection often?
Fixed size known at compile time?

div.p: Memory critical AND contains primitive types (int, float)?

g.text: Indexes are natural numbers and almost all/all indexes are used.
Java: there is no tuple in java-> Create your own wrapperclass or use a [Record](https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/16/language/records.html)

div.p: Python There is no implementation included in python
